design_plan: rng=42; hero_lines=2.3; aida=pass; density=grid-auto-flow:dense; contrast=pass; centered_hero=pass
headline: AI agent to build websites — research, code, publish, repeat

site_brief.audience: founders, operators, and creators who want an AI agent to build and publish websites
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'AI agent to build websites', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: AI agent to build websites
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can research, generate, push to GitHub, publish, and iterate website assets with real computer-use workflows

summary: An indexable Super use‑case page showing how a personal AI agent can build and publish websites end‑to‑end using real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache.
